title: Filter search to one workspace

posts.author: erin28 (Erin Warnecke)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m new to Monday.com and hoping someone can provide some information on narrowing search to one workspace.

From reading information available I can see that you can search a board or search everything but there doesn’t seem to be an option in-between to search all boards in one workspace.

My use case is that I have a workspace with four boards which is open to our whole business to create items and I want to avoid duplicates so have asked them to search first that the item hasn’t already been created. The only thing I’m finding though that the search is difficult to use because it’s returning lots of results from all of our workspaces.

We are using tags but this may miss things and it would be better if ‘search everything’ could be filtered to one workspace.

Does anyone have any workarounds for this or know if this feature may come in the future?

Thanks
